codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 6e27e0e and matching handoff/transcript artifacts. Error wrapping was added across internal/deploy and internal/runtime using contextual fmt.Errorf(... %w ...), preserving error chains and meeting the feature target (deploy bare returns reduced to 0; runtime reduced to 1 one-line delegate return).

summary: Feature implementation matches the described scope and expected behavior; no actionable defects were found in the reviewed diff.
